items.title: Bitcoin inflows to exchanges spike as BTC hits resistance at $75K
items.summary: Spikes in large deposits to exchanges have been associated with increased selling pressure, according to analysts at CryptoQuant.
items.title_cn: 比特币流入交易所激增，BTC在7.5万美元遭遇阻力
items.summary_cn: CryptoQuant分析师指出，交易所大额存款激增通常与抛售压力增加相关。

items.title: Bitcoin holds $70K, bringing spot ETF buyers close to breakeven: Is the bull market back?
items.summary: A Bitcoin price rally to $80,000 would bring the bulk of spot BTC ETF holders to breakeven on their positions and possibly signal the resumption of the crypto bull market.
items.title_cn: 比特币守住7万美元关口，现货ETF持有者接近盈亏平衡：牛市回归了吗？
items.summary_cn: 比特币价格若反弹至8万美元，将使大部分现货BTC ETF持有者实现盈亏平衡，并可能预示着加密货币牛市的恢复。

items.title: Bitcoin analysis sees $68K support as gold slips at key $5K level
items.summary: Bitcoin consolidated recent gains in the face of blanket skepticism over its rebound, while gold threatened to give up $5,000 support.
items.title_cn: 比特币分析显示6.8万美元为支撑位，黄金在关键5000美元关口承压
items.summary_cn: 比特币在普遍对其反弹持怀疑态度的情况下巩固近期涨幅，而黄金则面临失守5000美元支撑位的风险。

items.title: Strategy halts Bitcoin buying via STRC: Will BTC price dip again?
items.summary: Strategy often pauses BTC buys when STRC falls below $100, a setup that has previously coincided with 25%–40% Bitcoin declines.
items.title_cn: 策略暂停通过STRC购买比特币：BTC价格会再次下跌吗？
items.summary_cn: 该策略通常在STRC跌破100美元时暂停购买BTC，这种设置在过去曾伴随比特币25%-40%的跌幅。

items.title: Maestro launches mining-backed Bitcoin credit market for institutions
items.summary: Maestro launched Mezzamine, a Bitcoin credit market linking institutional BTC holders with miners seeking capital backed by mining output.
items.title_cn: Maestro为机构推出基于挖矿的比特币信贷市场
items.summary_cn: Maestro推出了Mezzanine，这是一个连接机构BTC持有者与寻求以挖矿产出为抵押资本的矿工的比特币信贷市场。

items.title: Vitalik Buterin promotes an update simplifying Ethereum node software
items.summary: The blockchain co-founder said the goal is to make the "self-sovereign" method of Ethereum users running their own nodes a user-friendly experience.
items.title_cn: Vitalik Buterin推广简化以太坊节点软件的更新
items.summary_cn: 这位区块链联合创始人表示，目标是使以太坊用户运行自己节点的“自我主权”方法成为一种用户友好的体验。

items.title: Ethereum Foundation sells $10.2M worth of ETH to BitMine in OTC deal
items.summary: The Ethereum Foundation completed a $10.2 million OTC sale of 5,000 ETH to BitMine as part of its treasury management strategy to fund operations and ecosystem development.
items.title_cn: 以太坊基金会通过场外交易向BitMine出售价值1020万美元的ETH
items.summary_cn: 以太坊基金会完成了向BitMine场外出售5000枚ETH（价值1020万美元）的交易，作为其资助运营和生态系统发展的资金管理策略的一部分。

items.title: Bitmine speeds pace of Ethereum buys, boosting treasury to 4.6M ETH
items.summary: About two-thirds of the company’s tokens are currently staked, generating an estimated $180 million in annualized revenue.
items.title_cn: Bitmine加快购买以太坊步伐，将金库增至460万枚ETH
items.summary_cn: 该公司约三分之二的代币目前处于质押状态，预计每年产生1.8亿美元的收入。

items.title: Three Ethereum indicators hint that $2.8K is the next ETH price target
items.summary: A symmetrical triangle breakout and an unresolved supply overhang are boosting the case that Ether may go as high as $2,800 in March.
items.title_cn: 三个以太坊指标暗示2800美元是下一个ETH价格目标
items.summary_cn: 对称三角形态突破和未解决的供应过剩问题增强了以太币可能在3月份涨至2800美元的预期。

items.title: Ether accumulation data points to a rally toward $2.8K, but there’s a catch
items.summary: Ether bulls appear to be targeting $2,800 as their next stop, but ETH futures data shows a divided market with limited odds for a sustained 33% rally.
items.title_cn: 以太坊积累数据指向向2800美元反弹，但存在隐忧
items.summary_cn: 以太坊多头似乎将2800美元视为下一个目标，但ETH期货数据显示市场存在分歧，持续33%反弹的几率有限。

items.title: GSR Acquires Autonomous and Architech to Launch Integrated Crypto Capital Markets Platform
items.summary: GSR has completed a $57 million acquisition of Autonomous and Architech to provide a unified treasury and capital markets solution for tokenized organizations. Global digital asset firm GSR announced the acquisition of Autonomous and Architech in New York on March 17, 2026, to streamline fragmented crypto infrastructure. Autonomous will maintain its brand to provide operational […]

items.title: Versabank Adds Foreign Exchange Functionality to Real Bank Tokenized Deposits
items.summary: Versabank has launched an initiative to integrate foreign exchange capabilities and rewards functionality into its proprietary Versaview blockchain interface to support the commercialization of tokenized deposits. Versabank announced on March 17, 2026, that it is adding foreign exchange (FX) functionality to its Real Bank Tokenized Deposits (RBTDs) through an enhancement of its Versaview blockchain interface. […]

items.title: UK Panel Calls Crypto Donations 'High Risk,' Seeks Immediate Ban
items.summary: A cross-party committee has warned that cryptocurrency donations leave UK politics open to foreign interference.
items.title_cn: 英国委员会称加密货币捐赠为'高风险'，寻求立即禁止
items.summary_cn: 一个跨党派委员会警告称，加密货币捐赠使英国政治面临外国干预的风险。

items.title: Bitcoin Depot Flags Control 'Weaknesses' as Connecticut Halts Its Operations
items.summary: Its license was suspended after regulators accused the Bitcoin ATM operator of overcharging kiosk users and failing to provide some refunds.
items.title_cn: Bitcoin Depot标记控制'弱点'，康涅狄格州暂停其运营
items.summary_cn: 其执照被暂停，此前监管机构指控该比特币ATM运营商向自助终端用户多收费且未提供部分退款。

items.title: Openclaw AI Skills Vulnerable to Malicious Exploits, Certik Researchers Warn
items.summary: A report by Certik highlights significant security flaws in Openclaw, an open-source AI platform, particularly its reliance on “skill scanning” which fails to adequately protect users from malicious third-party extensions. Limitations of the Clawhub Moderation Pipeline A report by cybersecurity firm Certik has revealed significant security gaps in OpenClaw, an open-source artificial intelligence agent platform, […]

items.title: Democrats Press Meta Over Facial Recognition Plans for Smart Glasses
items.summary: Lawmakers are citing privacy risks tied to wearable AI and are asking how Meta intends to secure consent from both users and bystanders.
items.title_cn: 民主党人就智能眼镜面部识别计划向Meta施压
items.summary_cn: 立法者引用了可穿戴AI带来的隐私风险，并询问Meta打算如何获取用户和旁观者的同意。

items.title: Nvidia’s DLSS 5 Launch Sparks Meme Frenzy as Gamers Balk at AI ‘Neural Rendering’
items.summary: NVIDIA pitched DLSS 5 as a breakthrough in real-time rendering. Players saw something closer to AI overreach.

items.title: Crypto Gift Card Platform Bitrefill Discloses Hack, Points Finger at North Korean Groups
items.summary: Bitrefill, which lets users swap Bitcoin, Dogecoin and other crypto assets for gift cards, disclosed a breach that took place on March 1.

ai_summary.en:
## **🌍 Global Macro & Liquidity**:

**Risk-On Environment Emerging**: Layer 1 signals a shift toward risk appetite. The DXY is weakening (-0.69% 5d), VIX is collapsing (-20.74% 5d), and the Yen is weak—all classic risk-on indicators. Fed futures show stable but restrictive expectations. However, BTC Fear & Greed at 26 (Fear) suggests crypto lags this macro shift.

**Narrative Mixed**: Layer 2 news is neutral-to-bullish for crypto infrastructure (GSR acquisition, Versabank FX integration) but regulatory headwinds persist (UK panel calls for donation ban). Ethereum-specific news is mildly bearish (Foundation selling $10.2M ETH).

## **🟠 BTC Strategy (Contract Only)**:
* **Signal**: **PROBE** (Long Bias)
* **Reality Check**: Funding is slightly positive (0.000038), but OI is up 1.08%—shows new interest. High short liquidations ($2.94M) vs long ($5.42M) indicate some short pain. RSI 59.1 is neutral, but ADX 43.8 shows a strong trend. Lower wick exhaustion at 8.7% suggests limited buying at lows. Wait for a volatility breakout (BB width 0.059 is tight).

## **🔷 ETH Strategy**:
* **Signal**: **OBSERVE**
* **Reality Check**: **CRITICAL DIVERGENCE**: News is bearish (Foundation selling), but whale flow shows **NEGATIVE token net flow (-110,108)**—this is ACCUMULATION. However, sentiment score is 0.0 with low confidence (47%). Technicals: RSI 68.1 is overbought, MACD negative, ADX 52.1 shows strong trend. Long liquidations ($9.23M) are high relative to short ($3.78M)—retail pain suggests caution. Upper wick exhaustion at 55.4% indicates heavy selling at highs.
* **Key Metric**: **Negative Token Net Flow (-110,108)** contradicts bearish news—whales are accumulating quietly.

## **🟣 SOL Strategy**:
* **Signal**: **EXECUTE** (Long Bias)
* **Reality Check**: Whale flow shows **POSITIVE token net flow (+170,063)** AND **positive stablecoin flow (+41,837)**—this is STRONG accumulation. Sentiment score 0.1 is low but confidence 44.4%. Technicals: RSI 59.9 neutral, MACD slightly negative, ADX 40.2 shows moderate trend. Funding is negative (-0.000050) and short liquidations ($304K) exceed long ($113K)—potential short squeeze setup. Upper wick exhaustion at 40.6% shows some selling resistance.
* **Key Metric**: **Positive Dual Flow (Tokens + Stablecoins)** indicates whale conviction.

## **BNB & DOGE Context**:
* **BNB**: **WAIT**—OI delta -5.84% shows declining interest, funding negative, no clear pain signal.
* **DOGE**: **OBSERVE**—High L/S account ratio (1.45) suggests retail long bias, but funding neutral and OI declining.
ai_summary.zh:
## **🌍 全球宏观与流动性**:

**风险偏好环境正在形成**: 第一层数据显示风险偏好正在转向。美元指数走弱（5日-0.69%），VIX恐慌指数暴跌（5日-20.74%），日元疲软——这些都是典型的风险偏好指标。美联储期货显示预期稳定但限制性。然而，BTC恐惧与贪婪指数为26（恐惧）表明加密货币滞后于这一宏观转变。

**叙事好坏参半**: 第二层新闻对加密基础设施中性偏多（GSR收购、Versabank增加外汇功能），但监管阻力持续（英国小组呼吁禁止加密捐款）。以太坊特定新闻略微偏空（基金会出售1020万美元ETH）。

## **🟠 BTC策略（仅合约）**:
* **信号**: **试探**（偏多）
* **现实检查**: 资金费率略微为正（0.000038），但未平仓量增长1.08%——显示新兴趣。高额空头清算（294万美元）相对于多头（542万美元）表明部分空头受损。RSI 59.1中性，但ADX 43.8显示趋势强劲。下影线耗尽率8.7%表明低点买盘有限。等待波动率突破（布林带宽度0.059较窄）。

## **🔷 ETH策略**:
* **信号**: **观察**
* **现实检查**: **关键背离**: 新闻偏空（基金会抛售），但鲸鱼流量显示**代币净流出为负（-110,108）**——这是吸筹。然而，情绪得分0.0且置信度低（47%）。技术面：RSI 68.1超买，MACD为负，ADX 52.1显示趋势强劲。多头清算（923万美元）相对于空头（378万美元）较高——散户受损需谨慎。上影线耗尽率55.4%表明高点抛压沉重。
* **关键指标**: **负代币净流量（-110,108）**与看空新闻矛盾——鲸鱼正在悄悄吸筹。

## **🟣 SOL策略**:
* **信号**: **执行**（偏多）
* **现实检查**: 鲸鱼流量显示**代币净流入为正（+170,063）**且**稳定币净流入为正（+41,837）**——这是强力吸筹。情绪得分0.1较低但置信度44.4%。技术面：RSI 59.9中性，MACD略负，ADX 40.2显示趋势中等。资金费率为负（-0.000050）且空头清算（30.4万美元）超过多头（11.3万美元）——潜在空头挤压机会。上影线耗尽率40.6%显示一定卖压。
* **关键指标**: **双重正向流量（代币+稳定币）**表明鲸鱼信心。

## **BNB与DOGE背景**:
* **BNB**: **等待**——未平仓量变化-5.84%显示兴趣下降，资金费率为负，无明确痛苦信号。
* **DOGE**: **观察**——高多空账户比率（1.45）表明散户偏多，但资金费率中性且未平仓量下降。
